g.text: Latency targets: RAG Q&A < 3s (sync) | Bookings async (Kafka job, webhook notify)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Scale: 10k daily users -> 20 orchestrator pods behind LB, Redis Cluster, K8s HPA
